backpackDesc: JSON backup of your profile and progress in this browser.
carePlaylistEmpty: No due care items in this module.
gardenEmpty: Finish a module (folder) on the map to plant a seed here.
gardenPlotHint: Each tile is a module you completed. Health shows how well you remember it (review in Care).
gardenRankingEmpty: No participants yet this week. Be the first!
gardenRankingError: Could not load the ranking right now.
gardenRankingNeedTree: Open a public network tree to see neighbors.
gardenRankingNote: Only learners who opted in. Based on weekly lumens (study + soft Arcade daily cap). Your Arcade 🎮 practice score is personal and is not this leaderboard.
gardenRankingOptInHint: You accepted forum and ranking when creating your online account. Use «Leave» to opt out of the ranking.
gardenRankingOptOutHint: You are not on the list. Tap «Join» to participate again.
gardenRankingNeedConsent: Confirm network use in Profile to join the ranking.
gardenShopDesc: Spend lumens on decoration or leaf shields. Decor is cosmetic only; shields protect your streak.
gardenShopMaxShields: You already have the maximum leaf shields.
gardenShopPurchasedShield: Leaf shield added to your pack!
streakHint: Consecutive days you studied (XP or care review)
streakShieldEarned: Leaf shield earned! It protects one missed day.
streakShieldUsed: A leaf shield saved your streak 🍃
